name: deepcodex
description: Commercial-grade DeepSeek coding agent with web, desktop, and CLI clients.

scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n server,web,desktop -c gray,blue,green "npm:dev -w @deepcodex/server" "npm:dev -w @deepcodex/web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:17361/api/health && npm:dev -w @deepcodex/desktop"
scripts.start:desktop: npm run build && npm run start -w @deepcodex/desktop
